qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Denial of service via Twig sandbox formula evaluation endpoint without authorization checks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The target advisory is blind SQL injection in the Commerce orders purchasables-table endpoint where the sort column reaches orderBy() without whitelist validation. This finding concerns Twig sandbox formula evaluation in FormulasController/Formulas.php and an unbounded for/range loop resource-exhaustion path, not the advisory's sort-parameter SQL injection root cause.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory describes SQL injection through the purchasables-table sort parameter being split on '|' and passed as an unvalidated orderBy() array key. The only qualifying finding in this run is a separate Twig sandbox formula denial-of-service issue in FormulasController/Formulas.php.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-j3x5-mghf-xvfw describes Craft Commerce SQL injection in GET /index.php?p=admin/actions/commerce/orders/purchasables-table via sort=id,(SELECT SLEEP(...))|asc.

The qualifying finding twig-formula-dos reports POST /actions/commerce/formulas/validate-formula and /validate-condition reaching Twig Environment::createTemplate()/render() with allowed for/range loops.
The qualifying finding's code locations are src/controllers/FormulasController.php and src/services/Formulas.php, with no overlap with the advisory's purchasables-table sorting/orderBy() path.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so Tier1, Tier2, and Tier3 are not applicable.

open_world_findings.title: Denial of service via Twig sandbox formula evaluation endpoint without authorization checks
open_world_findings.reason: Qualifying finding is preserved as open-world because it does not match the target advisory's SQL injection root cause.
